sections.paragraph: πρωτόμαρτυς, υρος, ὁ [πρῶτος, μάρτυς] preeminent witness, at expense of blood) Ac 22:20 v.l. (the later understanding of μάρτυς in the sense of a special class of ‘martyrs’ is not found in Luke-Acts, but a later copyist may have understood μάρτυς in the narrower heroic sense of ‘martyr’ and so read π. equivalent to first martyr).
